355 |         val areGlobalNotifsEnabled = androidx.core.app.NotificationManagerCompat.from(ctx).areNotificationsEnabled()
356 |         
357 |         // 2. Check Specific Mandatory Channels (Android 8.0+)
358 |         var areChannelsEnabled = true
359 |         if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
360 |             val mandatoryChannels = listOf("dns_guard_channel", "watcher_channel")
361 |             for (id in mandatoryChannels) {
362 |                 val channel = nm.getNotificationChannel(id)
363 |                 // If channel exists and importance is NONE, it's blocked
364 |                 if (channel != null && channel.importance == android.app.NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_NONE) {
365 |                     areChannelsEnabled = false
366 |                     break
367 |                 }
368 |             }
369 |         }
370 | 
371 |         val expected = "${ctx.packageName}/${GuardService::class.java.canonicalName}"
372 |         val enabledServices = android.provider.Settings.Secure.getString(ctx.contentResolver, android.provider.Settings.Secure.ENABLED_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICES) ?: ""
373 |         val hasAccessibility = enabledServices.contains(expected)
374 | 
375 |         // EXORCIST DEFENSE: Activity Recognition (Android 10+)
376 |         val hasActivity = if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES.Q) {
377 |             ctx.checkSelfPermission(android.Manifest.permission.ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION) == android.content.pm.PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
378 |         } else true
379 | 
380 |         // EXORCIST DEFENSE: DND Access (Android 6.0+)
381 |         val hasDndAccess = if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES.M) {
382 |             nm.isNotificationPolicyAccessGranted
383 |         } else true
384 | 
385 |         return !hasBattery || !hasAdmin || !hasAccessibility || !hasOverlay || !areGlobalNotifsEnabled || !areChannelsEnabled || !hasActivity || !hasDndAccess
386 |     }

493 |     fun updateUsageAndCheckBreak(ctx: Context, deltaMs: Long): Boolean {
494 |         if (!isLadderEnabled(ctx)) return false
495 |         val prefs = ctx.getSharedPreferences(PREFS, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
496 |         
497 |         var usage = prefs.getLong(KEY_USAGE_ACCUMULATED, 0L) + deltaMs
498 |         var lastT = prefs.getInt(KEY_LAST_THRESHOLD, 0)
499 |         
500 |         var breakMs = 0L
501 |         var newT = 0
502 | 
503 |         when {
504 |             // 90 Minute Cycle Reset (5 Minute Break)
505 |             usage >= T_RESET -> { breakMs = 5 * 60 * 1000L; usage = 0; newT = 0 }
506 |             // 80 Minute Interval (2 Minute Break)
507 |             usage >= T4 && lastT < 80 -> { breakMs = 2 * 60 * 1000L; newT = 80 }
508 |             // 60 Minute Interval (2 Minute Break)
509 |             usage >= T3 && lastT < 60 -> { breakMs = 2 * 60 * 1000L; newT = 60 }
510 |             // 40 Minute Interval (2 Minute Break)
511 |             usage >= T2 && lastT < 40 -> { breakMs = 2 * 60 * 1000L; newT = 40 }
512 |             // 20 Minute Interval (2 Minute Break)
513 |             usage >= T1 && lastT < 20 -> { breakMs = 2 * 60 * 1000L; newT = 20 }
514 |         }
515 | 
516 |         val editor = prefs.edit().putLong(KEY_USAGE_ACCUMULATED, usage)
517 |         if (breakMs > 0) {
518 |             editor.putLong(KEY_BREAK_END, System.currentTimeMillis() + breakMs)
519 |             editor.putInt(KEY_LAST_THRESHOLD, newT)
520 |             editor.apply()
521 |             return true
522 |         }
523 |         editor.apply()
524 |         return false
525 |     }

529 |     fun isBlacklistedBrowser(ctx: Context, pkg: String): Boolean {
530 |         // 1. Fast path: Static checks
531 |         if (pkg == "com.android.chrome") return true
532 |         if (ROGUE_APPS.contains(pkg)) return true
533 |         if (MANUAL_BLACKLIST.contains(pkg)) return true
534 | 
535 |         // 2. Cache path: Avoid PM query
536 |         BROWSER_CACHE[pkg]?.let { return it }
537 | 
538 |         // 3. Slow path: Package Manager Query (Sync or first time detection)
539 |         val intent = android.content.Intent(android.content.Intent.ACTION_VIEW, android.net.Uri.parse("https://www.google.com"))
540 |         intent.addCategory(android.content.Intent.CATEGORY_BROWSABLE)
541 |         
542 |         // Query PM safely
543 |         val isBrowser = try {
544 |             val list = ctx.packageManager.queryIntentActivities(intent, android.content.pm.PackageManager.MATCH_ALL)
545 |             list.any { it.activityInfo.packageName == pkg }
546 |         } catch (e: Exception) { false }
547 |         
548 |         BROWSER_CACHE[pkg] = isBrowser
549 |         return isBrowser

732 |     fun getNextPermissionIntent(ctx: Context): android.content.Intent? {
733 |         val nm = ctx.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as android.app.NotificationManager
734 |         val pm = ctx.getSystemService(Context.POWER_SERVICE) as android.os.PowerManager
735 |         val dpm = ctx.getSystemService(Context.DEVICE_POLICY_SERVICE) as android.app.admin.DevicePolicyManager
736 |         val adminComp = android.content.ComponentName(ctx, AdminReceiver::class.java)
737 | 
738 |         // 1. Accessibility (The Core)
739 |         val expected = "${ctx.packageName}/${GuardService::class.java.canonicalName}"
740 |         val enabledServices = android.provider.Settings.Secure.getString(ctx.contentResolver, android.provider.Settings.Secure.ENABLED_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICES) ?: ""
741 |         if (!enabledServices.contains(expected)) return android.content.Intent(android.provider.Settings.ACTION_ACCESSIBILITY_SETTINGS)
742 | 
743 |         // 2. Overlay
744 |         if (!android.provider.Settings.canDrawOverlays(ctx)) {
745 |             return android.content.Intent(android.provider.Settings.ACTION_MANAGE_OVERLAY_PERMISSION, android.net.Uri.parse("package:${ctx.packageName}"))
746 |         }
747 | 
748 |         // 3. Battery
749 |         if (!pm.isIgnoringBatteryOptimizations(ctx.packageName)) {
750 |             return android.content.Intent(android.provider.Settings.ACTION_REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS, android.net.Uri.parse("package:${ctx.packageName}"))
751 |         }
752 | 
753 |         // 4. Admin
754 |         if (!dpm.isAdminActive(adminComp)) {
755 |             return android.content.Intent(android.app.admin.DevicePolicyManager.ACTION_ADD_DEVICE_ADMIN).apply {
756 |                 putExtra(android.app.admin.DevicePolicyManager.EXTRA_DEVICE_ADMIN, adminComp)
757 |             }
758 |         }
759 | 
760 |         // 5. Notifications (DND Access & Channel check)
761 |         if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES.M && !nm.isNotificationPolicyAccessGranted) {
762 |             return android.content.Intent(android.provider.Settings.ACTION_NOTIFICATION_POLICY_ACCESS_SETTINGS)
763 |         }
764 | 
765 |         return null
766 |     }

768 |     fun getDailyUsage(ctx: Context): Long {
769 |         val usm = ctx.getSystemService(Context.USAGE_STATS_SERVICE) as android.app.usage.UsageStatsManager
770 |         val calendar = java.util.Calendar.getInstance()
771 |         calendar.set(java.util.Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY, 0)
772 |         calendar.set(java.util.Calendar.MINUTE, 0)
773 |         calendar.set(java.util.Calendar.SECOND, 0)
774 |         val startTime = calendar.timeInMillis
775 |         val endTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
776 | 
777 |         val stats = usm.queryUsageStats(android.app.usage.UsageStatsManager.INTERVAL_DAILY, startTime, endTime)
778 |         var totalTime = 0L
779 |         for (usageStat in stats) {
780 |             val pkg = usageStat.packageName
781 |             // 1. Don't count ourselves
782 |             if (pkg == ctx.packageName) continue
783 |             // 2. Don't count "Ghost" apps that run in parallel (Fixes the 3hr discrepancy)
784 |             if (GHOST_PACKAGES.any { pkg.contains(it) }) continue
785 |             
786 |             // 3. Only count if usage > 0 (Even if it's just 1ms, we keep it per your request)
787 |             if (usageStat.totalTimeInForeground > 0) {
788 |                 totalTime += usageStat.totalTimeInForeground
789 |             }
790 |         }
791 |         return totalTime
792 |     }

795 |         val usm = ctx.getSystemService(Context.USAGE_STATS_SERVICE) as android.app.usage.UsageStatsManager
796 |         val calendar = java.util.Calendar.getInstance()
797 |         calendar.set(java.util.Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY, 0)

799 |         calendar.set(java.util.Calendar.SECOND, 0)
800 |         
801 |         val stats = usm.queryUsageStats(android.app.usage.UsageStatsManager.INTERVAL_DAILY, calendar.timeInMillis, System.currentTimeMillis())
802 |         val sb = StringBuilder()
803 |         sb.append("\n--- HEAVY USAGE AUDIT (8HR MARK) ---\n")

807 |              .forEach { stat ->

809 |                  val isGhost = GHOST_PACKAGES.any { stat.packageName.contains(it) }
810 |                  sb.append("${if (isGhost) "[IGNORED]" else "[COUNTED]"} ${stat.packageName}: ${mins}m\n")
811 |              }
812 |         
813 |         val totalMins = getDailyUsage(ctx) / 60000
